title: is_no_storage checks Unavailable broadly, not just NoStorageAccess
description: The is_no_storage helper in the test module matches any SecretError::Unavailable. The name implies it only catches the NoStorageAccess variant, but it would also swallow any other transient Unavailable error from put(), masking real failures as graceful skips. Rename to is_unavailable or is_no_keyring_daemon so the broad match is obvious from the name. Alternatively, if the intent is truly to check only for no-daemon, inspect the source error string.
